summary: Scrambly — a Sonic franchise-themed super app combining a Sonic-themed search/browser, mobile games (including Block Blast and Sonic Forces), social/community features for age-matched users, parental controls with timers and kid detection, offline search and gameplay, offline/emergency calling, ad blocker, and age verification with camera-based eligibility checks.
architectural_notes: App name: Scrambly — Sonic-franchise themed super app targeting users aged 10–18
Age verification required on every login using device camera to confirm user eligibility (ages 10–18 allowed)
Offline-first architecture needed for search, games, and calling features
Community moderation system: warn → kick → require new account for policy violations
known_issues: Camera-based age detection is technically unreliable and raises privacy/legal concerns — may need alternative age verification approach
Offline calling is technically complex and may require P2P or mesh networking solutions
Licensing real mobile games (Sonic Forces etc.) requires third-party agreements
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Scrambly app logo with bold 'SCRAMBLY' wordmark styled in Sonic-blue and golden-yellow with speed-line accents (scrambly-logo.dim_512x256.png)
- Sonic-themed hero banner with rings, speed lines, and cobalt blue gradient background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Block Blast game thumbnail preview tile with colorful falling blocks on dark background (game-thumb-blockblast.dim_256x256.png)
- Sonic runner game thumbnail preview tile showing a blue hedgehog silhouette sprinting against a green hill backdrop (game-thumb-sonicrunner.dim_256x256.png)
- SOS emergency button icon, bold red circle with white lightning bolt (sos-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Parental controls shield icon in golden yellow with a lock symbol (parental-shield-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Scrambly community icon showing two stylized characters facing each other with speech bubbles in Sonic colors (community-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Create a Sonic franchise-themed search interface that allows users to search for Sonic-related content (characters, games, lore, media) using a curated local knowledge base, with offline search capability using cached data stored on-device.

Build a games library section with at least two playable in-browser games: a Block Blast-style puzzle game and a Sonic-themed runner game (inspired by Sonic Forces). Games must be playable offline without requiring a network connection.

Implement a social/community feature that allows registered users to connect with random other users of the same age. Include a community feed where users can post messages. Implement a moderation system that issues warnings for inappropriate behavior, and after repeated violations, locks the user's account requiring them to create a new one.

Implement age verification on every login using a declared age input form. Users must confirm they are between 10 and 18 years old to access the app. Users outside this range are shown a message and denied access.

Implement parental controls including: a configurable usage timer that locks the child out of the app when time is up, a PIN-protected parent dashboard to set the timer and review activity, and a 'kid mode' detection that restricts access to age-appropriate content and games when the logged-in user is under 13.

Add an emergency call button visible at all times within the app that, when tapped, opens the device's native phone dialer pre-filled with the local emergency number (e.g., 911). Include a visible 'SOS' button in the app's navigation or footer.

Add a built-in ad blocker indicator/toggle in the app settings that suppresses display of any third-party ad elements within the app's own content areas. Show a visual badge indicating 'Ads Blocked' status.

Apply a cohesive Sonic-franchise visual theme across the entire app: use Sonic's iconic color palette (cobalt blue, golden yellow, white, red accents), bold rounded typography, speed-line and ring motifs as decorative elements, and a playful energetic layout consistent with the Sonic brand. Apply this theme consistently to all pages including search, games, community, and settings.

new_feature_requests.summary: Sonic-themed search engine and browser with offline search support
Mobile games library including Block Blast, Sonic Forces, and other playable games with offline support
Social/community features: connect users with random people of the same age, community warnings/kicks for inappropriate behavior, offline and emergency calling
Parental controls: usage timer, kid detection/lockout, age verification with camera-based eligibility check on every login
Ad blocker built into the app
